name: will-plugins
description: Personal plugins for Chip's will agent ecosystem — reflect, wake, and subject-repo tools

plugins.name: reflect
plugins.description: End-of-session reflection skill. Summarizes the session and writes a dated reflection file to the will repo.

plugins.name: wake
plugins.description: Session start skill. Loads the four-layer context stack and presents a concise brief before work begins.

plugins.name: health-ingest
plugins.description: Research paper ingest fallback decision tree for the health repo.

plugins.name: commit-push
plugins.description: Skill that wraps the commit_push.py tool — replaces the git add/commit/push chain with one pre-approved CLI call.
